summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of People's Control web app. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are functioning excellently with only minor status code issue in backend.

minor_bugs.issue: Create Review returns 200 instead of 201 status code
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic only - review creation works correctly

design_compliments.observation: Excellent modern dark theme with proper Russian localization
design_compliments.quality: Professional grade UI with glass effects and proper contrast

design_compliments.observation: Perfect mobile adaptation with clean mobile-first design
design_compliments.quality: Responsive layout works excellently across all screen sizes

passed_tests: Reviews system (3/3 - minor status code issue)
Frontend dashboard page with stats display
Create review form with all inputs
Map page with Leaflet integration and search
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix Create Review endpoint to return 201 status code instead of 200 for proper REST compliance. All functionality is working correctly.
